## Phase 0 Step 0.4 — Stage-Readiness View (This Governance Wave)

> **Context**: This is a KNOWLEDGE_GOVERNANCE + CANON_GOVERNANCE wave — not a product build
> wave. The 12-stage pre-build model governs production module builds. For governance-only
> waves, readiness is assessed against wave authorization and upstream governance completeness,
> not against all 12 build stages. The stage-readiness view below maps governance preconditions.

| Stage | Pre-Build Stage Name | Governance Analogue | Status | Evidence / Basis |
|-------|--------------------|--------------------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | App Description | Wave Authorization | ✅ COMPLETE | Issue #1258 opened by @APGI-cmy (CS2). Wave purpose stated. CS2 authorization confirmed. |
| 2 | UX Workflow & Wiring Spec | Knowledge Wiring Plan | ✅ COMPLETE | Wave description declares all 6 files + change types + version targets. OVL-PBG-010–016 mapped to specific canon stages and §7.x sections. |
| 3 | FRS | Functional Requirements | ✅ COMPLETE | Each task has declared acceptance conditions above. Check IDs and pass criteria specified. |
| 4 | TRS | Technical Requirements | ✅ COMPLETE | Version targets specified (overlays v4.0.0, checklist v3.0.0, trigger table v2.3.0, index v3.4.0, canon v1.4.0). Upstream canon `PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md` v1.0.0 confirmed present. |
| 5 | Architecture | Governance Architecture | ✅ COMPLETE | Three-tier knowledge architecture applies. Files, paths, and inter-dependencies declared. PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md is the authoritative source. |
| 6 | QA-to-Red | Acceptance Conditions | ✅ COMPLETE | Acceptance conditions declared per task above. CORE-025 shape declared. OVL-PBG-010–016 expected content declared. These function as the RED criteria for handover assurance. |
| 7 | PBFAG | Pre-Brief Readiness Gate | ✅ COMPLETE — this is the PBFAG equivalent for governance waves | This Pre-Brief artifact IS the governance PBFAG. All upstream governance completeness confirmed. No scope blockers that prevent delegation (see §Scope Blockers for items requiring CS2 confirmation). |
| 8 | Implementation Plan | Task Breakdown | ✅ COMPLETE | 6 tasks declared in wave-current-tasks.md with clear deliverable per task. Sequencing: T-IAA-12S-001/002 (overlays) → T-IAA-12S-003 (checklist) → T-IAA-12S-004 (canon) → T-IAA-12S-005 (trigger table) → T-IAA-12S-006 (index). |
| 9 | Builder Checklist | Producing Agent Readiness | ⚠️ PENDING — builder/foreman to complete pre-build checklist | Producing agent (foreman-v2-agent or delegated builder) must confirm eligibility. Branch discrepancy (BLOCKER-001) must be resolved. |
| 10 | IAA Pre-Brief | IAA Pre-Brief | ✅ COMPLETE — this artifact | This artifact constitutes Stage 10 completion for this governance wave. |
| 11 | Builder Appointment | Delegation | ⚠️ PENDING — awaiting BLOCKER-001 resolution | Builder may be appointed after BLOCKER-001 (branch name) is confirmed by CS2. |
| 12 | Build | Implementation | ⏳ NOT STARTED | Begins after Stage 11 confirmed. |

## Phase 0 Step 0.4 — FFA Checks Applicable at Handover

Per `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` §Functional Fitness Assessment — for GOVERNANCE PRs,
the FFA asks: does the governance change align with strategy, avoid contradictions, and close gaps?

The following FFA checks will govern handover assurance:

| FFA Check | Governance Question | Failure Condition |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------|
| FFA-GOV-01 | Does each OVL-PBG-010–016 directly close a failure pattern documented in `PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md` §3.1? | Any new check that cannot be traced to a §3.1 failure pattern → advisory finding |
| FFA-GOV-02 | Does CORE-025 complement (not duplicate) existing CORE checks? | Duplication of CORE-001 through CORE-024 → REJECTION-PACKAGE |
| FFA-GOV-03 | Does the §Pre-Build Stage Assurance canon section create contradictions with existing §IAA Class Definition or §Hard-Trigger Authority? | Contradiction that weakens existing governance → REJECTION-PACKAGE |
| FFA-GOV-04 | Does the trigger table update introduce ambiguity in stage classification that could enable EXEMPT mis-classification? | Any new classification path that enables IAA bypass → REJECTION-PACKAGE |
| FFA-GOV-05 | Are all version bumps internally consistent (files that reference each other declare matching versions)? | Cross-reference version mismatch across changed files → advisory finding (not REJECTION-PACKAGE per Orientation Mandate) |
| FFA-GOV-06 | Does the CANON_INVENTORY reflect the post-wave canon version for `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md`? | CANON_INVENTORY not updated after T-IAA-12S-004 → REJECTION-PACKAGE (canon file change without inventory update is incomplete) |

## Phase 0 Step 0.4 — PREHANDOVER Ceremony Requirements

Per FAIL-ONLY-ONCE A-015: **full PREHANDOVER ceremony required for all Tier 2 knowledge patches**.

The producing agent's PREHANDOVER proof MUST contain:

| Field | Required Content |
|-------|----------------|
| `wave` | `iaa-12stage-upgrade` |
| `issue` | `#1258` |
| `tasks_completed` | List all 6 tasks with status |
| `files_changed` | All 5 files declared (iaa-category-overlays.md, iaa-core-invariants-checklist.md, iaa-trigger-table.md, index.md, INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md) |
| `version_bumps` | Declare pre/post version for each file |
| `iaa_audit_token` | Pre-populated expected token reference (per A-029) |
| `fail_only_once_attested` | true |
| `scope_declaration_updated` | true |
| `canon_inventory_updated` | true (for T-IAA-12S-004) |
| `ci_run_evidence` | CI run URL or commit SHA (per A-021 — commit before IAA invocation) |

**PREHANDOVER artifact**: Must be committed to branch before IAA handover invocation.  
**PREHANDOVER immutability**: Read-only post-commit (per A-029). IAA will not edit it.

## Phase 0 Step 0.4 — Scope Blockers

### BLOCKER-001 — Branch Name Discrepancy (Requires CS2 Confirmation)

**Severity**: ADVISORY (does not block delegation, but must be resolved before handover invocation)  
**Description**: The wave request declares branch `copilot/upgrade-iaa-12stage-prebuild-logic`.
The active working branch at Pre-Brief generation time is `copilot/upgrade-iaa-tier-logic`.  
**Action required**: CS2 or Foreman must confirm the canonical branch name before builder
appointment. If the branch is renamed or a new branch is created from the current one, the
Pre-Brief artifact must be present on the final branch before IAA handover invocation.  
**IAA check at handover**: `OVL-INJ-ADM-002` — Pre-Brief wave reference must match the branch
and wave-current-tasks.md on the branch at handover time.

### BLOCKER-002 — CANON_INVENTORY Staleness for `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md`

**Severity**: HARD — T-IAA-12S-004 must address this or IAA will REJECTION-PACKAGE  
**Description**: `governance/CANON_INVENTORY.json` currently shows `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md`
at v1.1.0. The actual file is at v1.3.0 (pre-wave state). After T-IAA-12S-004 bumps it to v1.4.0,
CANON_INVENTORY must reflect v1.4.0 with the correct file hash. The gap between v1.1.0 (inventory)
and v1.3.0 (actual) is a pre-existing staleness that the CANON_INVENTORY update should bridge directly
to v1.4.0 without requiring intermediate entries.  
**Action required**: T-IAA-12S-004 deliverable MUST include a CANON_INVENTORY.json update
setting `INDEPENDENT_ASSURANCE_AGENT_CANON.md` to v1.4.0 with a valid SHA256 hash.  
**IAA check at handover**: FFA-GOV-06 (REJECTION-PACKAGE if CANON_INVENTORY not updated).

### NON-BLOCKER-001 — PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md CANON_INVENTORY Hash

**Severity**: ADVISORY  
**Description**: `PRE_BUILD_STAGE_MODEL_CANON.md` is present in CANON_INVENTORY at v1.0.0 with
hash `91764b68657c0e91...`. This note does not assert any `file_hash` / `file_hash_sha256`
schema discrepancy in CANON_INVENTORY; IAA will verify this file is accessible and non-placeholder
at handover, but this item is not a blocker because no wave-specific remediation is required here.

### NON-BLOCKER-002 — IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL.md Referenced but Not in Wave Scope

**Severity**: INFORMATIONAL  
**Description**: The wave request references `IAA_PRE_BRIEF_PROTOCOL.md §Trigger` as the
invocation source. This canon is at v1.2.0 per CANON_INVENTORY. It is not in scope for
modification in this wave. No action required.
